images.depicts: great stone arched bridge glowing, ice/water below
bridge stretching over sunlit rushing water toward warm glow
images.issue: Water below reads more like flowing/foamy water than 'glittering ice'; acceptable-hold given ice-below.png separately covers the icy look.

emerald snake + tiny yellow chick on bridge, blurred white sheep in background
wide bridge view crossed by a hedgehog, bear cub, rabbit, fox and squirrel

images.depicts: golden lantern-cage hanging on bridge post, candle glowing inside
swirling icy/foamy water with sparkle, seen from above
dog leaping mid-air on bridge, joyful

smiling face carved into round wooden disc

line_map.line: Cross the bridge! Level Two is DONE! The tree is full!
A potato?! (NO!) P-p-potato! On the bridge!
The bridge… the ice… On the bridge?! (a potato!)

generate.line: The bridge is huge. / Cross, Snake! Cross, Chick! Sheep is on the bridge. (book:5)
generate.mj_prompt: a wide view of a tiny fluffy white sheep, an emerald-green snake, a small fluffy yellow chick and a dog crossing a vast glowing arched bridge toward a warm light on the far side, ultra-realistic photograph, dramatic spotlight on deep forest-green backdrop, soft shadows, cinematic, slightly whimsical --ar 3:2 --style raw

wrong_art.issue: Shows a hedgehog, bear cub, rabbit, fox and squirrel crossing the bridge instead of the designated Level-2 cast (Sheep, Snake, Chick, Dog) — wrong characters entirely, breaks cast continuity for this scene.
wrong_art.fix: Regenerate per huge-bridge-v2.png prompt above with the correct 4 cast members.
